data.body: AC amendment: realpath fallback order must be: (a) realpath "$path" 2>/dev/null, (b) (cd "$path" 2>/dev/null && pwd -P), (c) literal path fallback. The cd-based fallback only works for existing directories; the literal fallback matches Python's error-swallowing behavior. Add acceptance criterion verifying realpath handles symlinked .tickets-tracker correctly.
